headline: Deterministic multi-system repo census -- files / code-LOC / primary-language per system + cross-system deps. The perceive stage's structural inventory, content-addressed (sha256 of the canonical inventory, root path excluded) as the seam join key.

capabilities.label: Inventory a repo into per-system file/LOC counts (content-addressed, read-only)
capabilities.notes: Read-only, deterministic (same tree -> same join key; absolute root excluded from the hash). {root} is a forward-slash path relative to repo_root (the gateway cwd) or absolute. A large tree does a full os.walk + cross-system grep -> may approach the 20s gateway timeout.
